###############################################################################
#  KEYBINDINGS — XFCE
#  Source: etc/skel/.config/xfce4/xfconf/xfce-perchannel-xml/xfce4-keyboard-shortcuts.xml
#  Generated: 2026.06.30 by /kiro-keybindings-all — DO NOT EDIT BY HAND
###############################################################################

── 1. Applications & Launchers ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + Return            alacritty (terminal)
  super + t                 alacritty (terminal)
  ctrl + alt + Return       alacritty (terminal)
  ctrl + alt + t            alacritty (terminal)
  ctrl + alt + KP_Enter     alacritty (terminal)
  super + KP_Enter          alacritty (terminal)
  F12                       alacritty (terminal)
  super + h                 alacritty -e btop (system monitor)
  ctrl + alt + End          alacritty -e btop (system monitor)
  super + d                 dmenu_run (app launcher)
  shift + super + d         dmenu_run (app launcher)
  alt + F1                  whisker menu (applications menu)
  ctrl + super + Alt_L      whisker menu (applications menu)
  alt + F2                  xfce4-appfinder (collapsed)
  alt + F3                  xfce4-appfinder
  super + w                 web browser (exo-open)
  super + F1                vivaldi
  super + F2                code (VS Code)
  super + F3                inkscape
  super + F4                gimp
  super + F5                meld
  super + F6                vlc
  super + F7                virtualbox
  super + F8                thunar (file manager)
  super + F9                virt-manager
  super + F10               spotify
  XF86WWW / HomePage        web browser (exo-open)
  XF86Mail                  mail reader (exo-open)
  ctrl + alt + f            firefox
  ctrl + alt + g            chromium
  ctrl + alt + c            chromium
  ctrl + alt + v            vivaldi
  ctrl + alt + o            opera
  ctrl + alt + b            brave
  shift + super + Return    thunar (file manager)
  shift + super + KP_Enter  thunar (file manager)
  super + e                 code (VS Code)
  ctrl + alt + d            obs
  ctrl + alt + a            alacritty-tweak-tool
  ctrl + alt + q            alacritty-tweak-tool
  ctrl + alt + s            fish-tweak-tool
  ctrl + alt + z            fastfetch-tweak-tool
  ctrl + alt + w            fastfetch-tweak-tool
  ctrl + alt + e            archlinux-tweak-tool
  ctrl + alt + i            kiro-iso-builder
  ctrl + alt + p            pamac-manager (package manager)
  alt + r                   rofi-theme-selector
  alt + n                   variety -n (next wallpaper)
  alt + Right               variety -n (next wallpaper)
  alt + p                   variety -p (previous wallpaper)
  alt + Left                variety -p (previous wallpaper)
  alt + t                   variety -t (trash wallpaper)
  alt + f                   variety -f (favorite wallpaper)
  alt + Up                  variety --toggle-pause
  alt + Down                variety --resume
  ctrl + super + space      variety --selector

── 2. Window Management ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + q                 close window
  shift + super + q         close window
  alt + F10                 maximize window
  alt + F11                 fullscreen
  alt + F9                  minimize (hide) window
  alt + F6                  stick window (show on all workspaces)
  alt + F12                 keep window above others
  alt + F7                  move window (then arrows / Escape)
  alt + F8                  resize window (then arrows / Escape)
  alt + Tab                 cycle windows
  alt + shift + Tab         cycle windows (reverse)
  super + Tab               switch window
  shift + alt + Page_Up     raise window
  shift + alt + Page_Down   lower window
  alt + space               window operations menu
  Left/Right/Up/Down        nudge during move/resize mode
  Escape                    cancel move/resize

── 3. Workspaces / Tags / Groups ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  ctrl + F1..F12            switch to workspace 1–12
  ctrl + alt + Left         switch to workspace left
  ctrl + alt + Right        switch to workspace right
  ctrl + alt + Up           switch to workspace up
  ctrl + alt + Down         switch to workspace down
  ctrl + alt + KP_1..KP_9   send window to workspace 1–9
  ctrl + shift + alt + Left   move window to workspace left
  ctrl + shift + alt + Right  move window to workspace right
  ctrl + shift + alt + Up     move window to workspace up
  ctrl + alt + Home         move window to previous workspace
  alt + Insert              add workspace
  alt + Delete              remove workspace

── 6. Multimedia & Hardware ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
  XF86AudioPlay             playerctl play-pause
  XF86AudioStop             playerctl stop
  XF86AudioPrev             playerctl previous
  XF86AudioNext             playerctl next
  XF86AudioRaiseVolume      pamixer -i 10 (volume up)
  XF86AudioLowerVolume      pamixer -d 10 (volume down)
  XF86AudioMute             pamixer -t (mute toggle)
  super + v                 pavucontrol (audio mixer)
  ctrl + alt + u            pavucontrol (audio mixer)
  super + p                 xfce4-display-settings (display)
  XF86Display               xfce4-display-settings (display)
  XF86MonBrightnessUp       xbacklight -inc 10 (brightness up)
  XF86MonBrightnessDown     xbacklight -dec 10 (brightness down)

── 7. Screenshots ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  Print                     xfce4-screenshooter -f (fullscreen)
  ctrl + Print              xfce4-screenshooter (GUI)
  ctrl + shift + Print      gnome-screenshot -i (interactive)
  ctrl + super + Print      flameshot gui

── 8. System & Session ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  ctrl + alt + l            archlinux-logout --settings
  ctrl + alt + k            archlinux-logout
  ctrl + alt + r            archlinux-betterlockscreen (lock screen)
  super + x                 archlinux-logout
  shift + super + x         xfce4-session-logout
  super + Escape            xkill (force-close a window)
  ctrl + alt + Escape       xkill (force-close a window)
  super + shift + Escape    xkill (force-close a window)
  ctrl + shift + Escape     xfce4-taskmanager
  ctrl + alt + m            mintstick -m iso (USB image writer)
  ctrl + alt + n            xfce4-settings-manager
  ctrl + alt + comma        mintstick -m iso (USB image writer)
  ctrl + Escape             xfdesktop --menu (desktop menu)
  ctrl + super + s          kiro-keybindings (this cheatsheet)
